---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact

Thank you for visiting my portfolio.

I’m always happy to connect with professionals, recruiters, classmates, and collaborators.

## Email

📧 alinayanxi@gmail.com

## LinkedIn

🔗 https://www.linkedin.com/in/alinayanxi/

## GitHub

🔗 https://github.com/alinayanxi

---

## Areas of Interest

- Market Intelligence
- Business Analytics
- Marketing Strategy
- Business Development
- Customer Insights

Feel free to reach out for opportunities, collaboration, or simply to connect.
